---
title: "Experience"
---

## Citigroup Inc.

Data Analytics Senior Analyst

- Produced data metrics and analytics
- Supported reporting for business and regulators
- Used Tableau and PowerBI

---

## NYC Department of Transportation

Intern

- Conducted site visits
- Managed permit applications
- Analyzed survey data

---

## Dollaride

Intern

- Conducted research
- Collected and analyzed survey data
